_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Day-to-day changes in iPNF and N0(32) proliferation were generally subtle, but GOF lines outgrew the control luciferase lines
details: GOF lines outgrew the control luciferase lines over 5 days with P-value of .004 for NOTCH1 vs Luc and .0143 for NOTCH3 vs Luc
